title: XBP project config (.xbp/xbp.{yaml,yml,toml,json,jsonc})
description: Canonical project configuration for the XBP CLI. Same schema applies to YAML, TOML, JSON, and JSONC (`.xbp/xbp.yaml`, `.xbp/xbp.toml`, `.xbp/xbp.json`, …). Editors: VS Code YAML (yaml.schemas), Even Better TOML (evenBetterToml.schema.associations), and built-in JSON schemas. Optional object fields accept null in YAML/JSON (common after generate/migrate); TOML omits nulls.
markdownDescription:
Canonical **XBP** project config — one schema for all formats:

| Path | Format |
|------|--------|
| `.xbp/xbp.yaml` / `xbp.yml` | YAML |
| `.xbp/xbp.toml` | TOML |
| `.xbp/xbp.json` / `xbp.jsonc` | JSON / JSONC |

- Required: `project_name`, `port`, `build_dir`
- Multi-service: `services[]` (`name` first)
- OpenAPI: `openapi` + `services[].openapi`
- Optional objects may be `null` in YAML/JSON; omit keys in TOML
- Migrate: `xbp config migrate-config-file --format toml`

project_name.description: Human-readable project name (dashboards, release titles, service defaults).
project_name.markdownDescription:
Human-readable project name used in dashboards, release titles, and service defaults.

Examples: `XBP`, `@suitsfinance/formations`

version.description: Project version string (semver recommended). Default 0.1.0 when omitted on parse.

port.description: Primary service port for the root project / default service.

build_dir.description: Build / working directory relative to the project root (often `.` or `./`).

app_type.markdownDescription:
Detected or declared application type.

Common values: `rust`, `nextjs`, `nodejs`, `expressjs`, `docker`, `python`, `openapi`, `terraform`

target.description: Legacy alias for app/runtime target (prefer app_type / per-service target).

branch.description: Legacy default git branch for the root service.

build_command.description: Root build command when not using multi-service `services[].commands`.

environment.markdownDescription:
Environment variables.

Values may be literals or `${ENV}` placeholders resolved at runtime.

url.description: Public URL for the primary service.

crate_name.description: Legacy Rust crate name for single-crate projects.

npm_script.description: Legacy npm script name for start.

services.description: Multi-service definitions (discovered by `xbp version discover` or hand-authored).
services.markdownDescription:
Multi-service definitions.

Each entry needs `name`, `target`, `branch`, `port`. Configure OpenAPI under `services[].openapi` via `xbp config openapi`.

workers.description: Cloudflare Workers (and optional Containers) managed via `xbp cloudflare` / `xbp workers`.
workers.markdownDescription:
Worker apps for Wrangler deploy.

Each item: **name**, **root**, optional `script_name`, `service`, `deploy`.

```yaml
workers:
- name: api
  root: apps/api
  script_name: xbp-api
  service: '@xylex-group/xbp-api-worker'
  deploy:
    command: pnpm run deploy
    ci_script: scripts/deploy-ci.mjs
    select_script: scripts/select-deploy-command.mjs
```

Also: `versioning_disabled`, `watch_ignore_paths` (project-level arrays).

defaultSnippets.label: workers list (api/docs/pkg/web)
defaultSnippets.body:
- name: api
  root: apps/api
  script_name: xbp-api
  service: '@xylex-group/xbp-api-worker'
  deploy:
    command: pnpm run deploy
    ci_script: scripts/deploy-ci.mjs
    select_script: scripts/select-deploy-command.mjs
- name: docs
  root: apps/docs
  script_name: xbp-docs
  service: '@xylex-group/xbp-docs'
  deploy:
    command: pnpm run deploy
    ci_script: scripts/deploy-ci.mjs
    select_script: scripts/select-deploy-command.mjs
- name: pkg
  root: apps/pkg
  script_name: xbp-pkg
  service: '@xylex-group/xbp-pkg-worker'
  deploy:
    command: pnpm run deploy
    ci_script: scripts/deploy-ci.mjs
    select_script: scripts/select-deploy-command.mjs
- name: web
  root: apps/web
  script_name: xbp
  service: '@xylex-group/xbp-app'
  deploy:
    command: pnpm run deploy
    ci_script: scripts/deploy-ci.mjs
    select_script: scripts/select-deploy-command.mjs

version_targets.description: Project-level version manifest paths always bumped with the project version.

version_domains.description: Explicit multi-version domain policies (`xbp version domain`).

ignore_paths.description: Gitignore-style paths skipped by service discovery and version-target discovery (not worktree-watch). Aliases: ignored_paths, xbpignore.

versioning_disabled.description: Service names or root globs excluded from version bumps. Aliases: disabled_versioning_services, no_version_services.

release_disabled.description: Service names or root globs excluded from releases. Aliases: disabled_release_services, no_release_services.

linear.description: Repo-scoped Linear settings (team defaults, release initiatives). Null clears/omits.
linear.markdownDescription:
Repo-scoped **Linear** settings.

```yaml
linear:
  default_team_key: SUI
  default_team_id: null
  organization_name: my-org
  release:
    enabled: true
    initiative_ids: [uuid]
```

defaultSnippets.label: Linear team + release
defaultSnippets.body:
default_team_key: ${1:TEAM}
  default_team_id: null
  organization_name: null
  release:
    enabled: true
    initiative_ids: []
    health: null
    organization_name: null

github.description: GitHub repository, auto-push, release-branch, and runners. Bare owner/repo string, object, or null.
github.markdownDescription:
GitHub project settings.

**Shorthand** (recommended when only repo is set):
```yaml
github: xylex-group/xbp
```

**Full object:**
```yaml
github:
  repository: xylex-group/xbp
  auto_push_on_commit: true
```

defaultSnippets.label: full GitHub config

repository.description: owner/repo when origin cannot be inferred. Also accepted as bare string under github:.

auto_push_on_commit.description: When true, auto-commit flows push after creating the commit (stash-safe rebase when behind).

runners.description: Self-hosted / managed GitHub runners project defaults.

publish.description: npm / crates.io / cargo-dist publish settings (`xbp version release` / publish flows). Null when unused.
publish.markdownDescription:
Package publish settings.

```yaml
publish:
  crates:
    enabled: true
    package_name: xbp
    manifest_path: crates/cli/Cargo.toml
    token: ${CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN}
  npm: null
  dist:
    enabled: true
    installers: [shell, powershell]
```

defaultSnippets.label: crates + dist

openapi.description: Project-level OpenAPI generation (`xbp config openapi`, `xbp generate openapi`). Null when disabled/unset.
openapi.markdownDescription:
Project-level **OpenAPI** generation.

```yaml
openapi:
  enabled: true
  auto_detect_services: true
  generate_on_release: true
  service_defaults:
    spec_version: "3.1.0"
    source_roots: [src]
    outputs:
      yaml: openapi.yaml
      json: openapi.json
  aggregate:
    enabled: false
```

Per-service overrides: `services[].openapi` (incl. `aggregate_path_prefix`).

defaultSnippets.label: OpenAPI project defaults
defaultSnippets.body:
enabled: true
  auto_detect_services: true
  generate_on_release: true
  service_defaults:
    spec_version: "3.1.0"
    strict: false
    unknown_schema: permissive
    source_roots: [src]
    outputs:
      yaml: openapi.yaml
      json: openapi.json
  aggregate:
    enabled: false

todos.description: TODO→issue automation defaults for `xbp todos` / `xbp issues` (project overrides global). Alias: `issues`. Null when unset.
todos.markdownDescription:
Defaults for **`xbp todos`** / **`xbp issues`** (`scan`, `sync`, `status`).

Prefer **`issues:`** for new configs; **`todos:`** is still read as a fallback.

```yaml
todos:
  default_to: github          # linear | github | both
  auto_yes: true
  prompt_sync_after_scan: true
  annotate_source: true
  github_labels: [xbp-todo]
  linear_labels: [xbp-todo]
  linear_assignee: null       # me | name | email | id
  linear_project: null
  linear_link_wait_secs: 20
  linear_link_poll_ms: 2000
  purge_duplicate_linear: true
  kinds: null                 # or [TODO, FIXME, HACK, XXX]
  priority_by_kind:
    FIXME: 1
    HACK: 2
    TODO: 3
    XXX: 4
  openrouter_enrich: false
  openrouter_enrich_model: null
  watch_paths: [crates, apps, scripts]
```

defaultSnippets.label: todos / issues automation (full)
defaultSnippets.body:
annotate_source: true
  auto_yes: true
  default_to: github
  github_labels:
  - xbp-todo
  kinds: null
  linear_assignee: null
  linear_labels:
  - xbp-todo
  linear_link_poll_ms: 2000
  linear_link_wait_secs: 20
  linear_project: null
  openrouter_enrich: false
  openrouter_enrich_model: null
  priority_by_kind:
    FIXME: 1
    HACK: 2
    TODO: 3
    XXX: 4
  prompt_sync_after_scan: true
  purge_duplicate_linear: true
  watch_paths:
  - crates
  - apps
  - scripts
  - package_install_scripts
  - sql

issues.description: Preferred alias for TODO→issue automation (same shape as `todos`). Project overrides global `issues:`.
issues.markdownDescription:
Same schema as **`todos`**. Preferred key for new configs (`xbp issues scan|sync`).

If both `issues` and `todos` are set, project resolution prefers **`issues`** (global config) / project CLI may merge — keep one block.

database.description: Optional control-plane / Athena database linkage. Null when unused.

systemd.description: Root systemd unit config (object), unit name (string), or null.
systemd.markdownDescription:
Root **systemd** settings.

- `null` — unset
- string — unit name shorthand
- object — environment_files, config_paths, …

systemd_service_name.description: Root systemd unit name when not using the string form of `systemd`.

kafka_brokers.description: Kafka broker list for log streaming / related features.

kafka_public_url.description: Public Kafka URL when brokers are internal.

log_files.description: Log file paths to tail / ship.

monitor_method.description: HTTP method for synthetic monitor checks.

monitor_expected_code.description: Expected HTTP status for monitor success.

oci.description: Project-level OCI registry credentials and defaults. Per-service image config: services[].oci.

kubernetes.description: Project-level Kubernetes defaults (context, namespace, apply safety).

deploy.description: Project-level deploy defaults and named service groups for `xbp deploy <target>`.

discord.description: Project Discord webhook + per-event notification toggles (overrides global).

service.description: One deployable / versionable service in a multi-service project.

name.description: Stable service id (not a packaging path; never include crate versions).

target_freeze.description: When true, discovery/generate must not auto-overwrite `target` (e.g. Dockerfile detection). Aliases: freeze_target, target_frozen. Default false.
target_freeze.markdownDescription:
When **true**, `xbp version discover` / service registration will **not** replace this service's `target` from filesystem detection (Dockerfile → docker, etc.).

Default: `false` (omit or set false). Aliases: `freeze_target`, `target_frozen`.

branch.description: Default git branch for this service.

commands.description: Lifecycle and custom scripts (pre, install, build, start, dev, plus arbitrary names).

force_run_from_root.description: When true, run commands from project root instead of root_directory.

version_targets.description: Manifests to bump for this service (Cargo.toml, package.json, …).

depends_on.description: Service names this service depends on (deploy graph edges).

watch_paths.description: Dirty-tree path prefixes that mark this service as a version candidate.

versioning.description: When false, exclude from version bumps. Aliases: versioning_enabled, enable_versioning.

release.description: When false, exclude from releases (bumps may still run). Aliases: release_enabled, enable_release.

systemd_service_name.description: Systemd unit name for this service.

systemd.description: Systemd unit config (object), unit name (string), or null.

openapi.description: Per-service OpenAPI overrides (`xbp config openapi`, `xbp generate openapi --service`).
openapi.markdownDescription:
Per-service OpenAPI settings.

```yaml
openapi:
  enabled: true
  source_roots: [src]
  outputs:
    yaml: openapi.yaml
    json: openapi.json
  aggregate_path_prefix: /@myorg/my-service
  framework: null   # rust | node | python | auto
```

defaultSnippets.label: service OpenAPI
defaultSnippets.body:
enabled: true
  source_roots: [src]
  outputs:
    yaml: openapi.yaml
    json: openapi.json
  aggregate_path_prefix: /${1:service-name}

oci.description: Optional OCI image config for this service (`xbp deploy` / `xbp oci`).

deploy.description: Deploy orchestration for this service (`xbp deploy <name>`). Distinct from commands.deploy.

serviceCommands.description: Known lifecycle keys plus arbitrary custom command names (test, lint, publish, deploy, …).
serviceCommands.markdownDescription:
Service commands map.

Known: `pre`, `install`, `build`, `start`, `dev` (string or null).
Custom keys allowed (e.g. `test`, `lint`, `deploy:ci`).

worker.description: Cloudflare Worker entry managed by XBP (`xbp workers`, `xbp cloudflare`).
worker.markdownDescription:
One Worker app.

**Required:** `name`, `root`

```yaml
- name: api
  root: apps/api
  script_name: xbp-api
  service: '@xylex-group/xbp-api-worker'
  deploy:
    command: pnpm run deploy
    ci_script: scripts/deploy-ci.mjs
    select_script: scripts/select-deploy-command.mjs
```

defaultSnippets.label: worker app

name.description: Short worker id (e.g. api, docs, pkg, web). Used by `xbp workers deploy <name>`.

root.description: Project-relative Worker root (directory with wrangler.toml / wrangler.jsonc).

script_name.description: Deployed Cloudflare Worker script name (wrangler name).

service.description: Linked `services[].name` for this worker (package / service id).

durable_objects.description: Durable Objects bindings, migrations, and namespaces.

workerDeploy.description: Worker deploy hooks used by `xbp workers deploy` / CI selection scripts.
workerDeploy.markdownDescription:
```yaml
deploy:
  command: pnpm run deploy
  ci_script: scripts/deploy-ci.mjs
  select_script: scripts/select-deploy-command.mjs
```

command.description: Local deploy command run from the worker root (e.g. pnpm run deploy).

ci_script.description: Repo-relative CI deploy helper script (e.g. scripts/deploy-ci.mjs).

select_script.description: Script that chooses which deploy command variant to run (CI vs local).

workerContainer.description: Cloudflare Containers binding for a Worker.

workerDurableObjects.description: Durable Objects bindings, migrations, and namespaces for a Worker.

versionDomain.description: Independent version domain for multi-package monorepos.

default_team_id.description: Linear team UUID for create / TODO sync.

default_team_key.description: Team key such as XLX or SUI when default_team_id is unset.

organization_name.description: Linear org slug for human URLs. Alias: org_name.

linearRelease.description: Linear initiative publishing for version releases.

enabled.description: When true, publish release notes to Linear initiatives.

organization_name.description: Org slug override for release posts. Alias: org_name.

health.description: Optional initiative health label for the release post.

github.description: Full GitHub project object (prefer bare string when only repository is set).

repository.description: owner/repo when origin cannot be inferred. Also accepted as bare string under github:.

auto_push_on_commit.description: When true, auto-commit flows push after creating the commit (stash-safe rebase when behind).

runners.description: Self-hosted / managed GitHub runners project defaults.

enabled.description: When true, create release branches using naming_template.

naming_template.description: Branch name template. Placeholders: {VERSION}, {SERVICE_NAME}. Alias: template.

githubRunners.description: GitHub Actions runner fleet defaults for this project.

default_organization.description: GitHub org that owns the runners.

work_directory.description: Working directory on the runner host.

npm.description: npm publish target, or null if unused.

crates.description: crates.io publish target, or null if unused.

dist.description: cargo-dist settings, or null if unused.

publish.markdownDescription:
npm / crates.io / cargo-dist publish settings (`xbp version release`).

```yaml
publish:
  crates:
    enabled: true
    package_name: xbp
    manifest_path: crates/cli/Cargo.toml
    working_directory: crates/cli
    token: ${CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN}
    use_wsl: true
    preflight_commands: [cargo test]
    publish_command: cargo publish
    no_verify_retry_packages: []
  dist:
    enabled: true
    allow_dirty: true
    generate_ci: true
    artifacts_modes: [host, global]
    installers: [shell, powershell]
    packages: [xbp]
    targets: []
  npm: null
```

defaultSnippets.label: crates + cargo-dist publish
defaultSnippets.body:
crates:
    enabled: true
    package_name: ${1:xbp}
    manifest_path: ${2:crates/cli/Cargo.toml}
    working_directory: ${3:crates/cli}
    token: ${CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN}
    use_wsl: true
    preflight_commands:
    - cargo test
    publish_command: cargo publish
    no_verify_retry_packages: []
    access: null
    generate_npmrc: null
    retry_no_verify: null
    visibility_poll_seconds: null
    visibility_timeout_seconds: null
    wsl_distribution: null
  dist:
    enabled: true
    allow_dirty: true
    generate_ci: true
    artifacts_modes:
    - host
    - global
    installers:
    - shell
    - powershell
    packages:
    - ${1:xbp}
    targets: []
    tool: null
  npm: null

publishTarget.description: Single registry publish target (npm or crates).
publishTarget.markdownDescription:
Publish target for npm or crates.io.

Common fields: `enabled`, `package_name`, `manifest_path`, `working_directory`, `token`, `use_wsl`.

enabled.description: Whether this target is published during release.

working_directory.description: Directory to run publish commands from (project-relative).

manifest_path.description: Cargo.toml or package.json path for this package.

token.description: Auth token or `${ENV}` placeholder (never commit raw secrets).

wsl_distribution.description: WSL distro name when use_wsl is true.

retry_no_verify.description: Retry cargo publish --no-verify after local tarball verification fails (crates).

no_verify_retry_packages.description: Package names that always get a --no-verify retry.

visibility_timeout_seconds.description: Seconds to wait for published version on the registry (default ~180).

visibility_poll_seconds.description: Poll interval while waiting for registry visibility (default ~5).

publishDist.description: cargo-dist settings for GitHub release assets/installers.

enabled.description: When true (or dist-workspace.toml present), build/upload dist artifacts on release.

targets.description: Rust target triples. Empty keeps host-mode defaults.

artifacts_modes.description: Artifact modes: host | local | global. Alias: artifacts.

allow_dirty.description: Pass --allow-dirty to dist (default true during release ledgers).

generate_ci.description: Run dist generate --mode ci when missing/out of date.

tool.description: dist CLI binary name (dist or cargo-dist).

openapiOutputs.description: Generated OpenAPI artifact paths (relative to service root or aggregate root).

yaml.description: YAML output path (e.g. openapi.yaml). Empty/null to skip.

json.description: JSON output path (e.g. openapi.json). Empty/null to skip.

openapiServiceDefaults.description: Defaults applied to every service OpenAPI generate unless overridden.

strict.description: When true, fail on unresolved / incomplete schema inference.

source_roots.description: Default source directories relative to each service root.

unknown_schema.description: How to handle untyped / unknown schemas.

openapiAggregate.description: Combine per-service specs into one multi-service OpenAPI document.

enabled.description: When true, produce an aggregate OpenAPI document after service generates.

outputs.description: Where to write the aggregate document.

overlay.description: Optional overlay file path merged into the aggregate.

projectOpenapi.markdownDescription:
Project OpenAPI block (`xbp config openapi`).

- `service_defaults` — applied to each service
- `aggregate` — optional multi-service combine
- Per-service: `services[].openapi`

auto_detect_services.description: When true, include services without an explicit openapi block when generating --all.

generate_on_release.description: When true, run OpenAPI generation during version release (requires openapi-gen feature).

service_defaults.description: Defaults for per-service generation (spec_version, source_roots, outputs, …).

serviceOpenapi.description: Per-service OpenAPI overrides and generation inputs.
serviceOpenapi.markdownDescription:
Per-service OpenAPI config.

Important fields:
- `enabled`
- `source_roots`
- `outputs.yaml` / `outputs.json`
- `aggregate_path_prefix` — prefix routes when combining services (e.g. `/@org/svc`)
- `framework` — `rust` | `node` | `python` (empty = auto)

enabled.description: When false, skip this service during generate. When null/omitted, auto_detect may still include it.

framework.description: Framework hint for route discovery (rust, node, python). Empty/null = auto-detect.

spec_version.description: Override OpenAPI version for this service.

strict.description: Override project default strict mode for this service.

source_roots.description: Source directories relative to this service root_directory.

outputs.description: Per-service output paths (relative to service root).

unknown_schema.description: How to treat unknown types in this service.

overlay.description: Optional OpenAPI overlay path merged after generation.

aggregate_path_prefix.description: Path prefix applied when combining services (avoids route collisions).
aggregate_path_prefix.markdownDescription:
Prefix for aggregate merge, e.g. `/athena` or `/@suitsfinance/formations`.

Required uniqueness across services when `openapi.aggregate.enabled` is true.

server_derivation.description: How servers[] entries are derived for this service.

websocket_routes.description: Explicit WebSocket route annotations for OpenAPI.

openapiServerDerivation.description: Derive OpenAPI servers from service URL and/or local defaults.

from_service_url.description: When true, add a server entry from services[].url.

service_url_description.description: Description for the service-url server entry.

openapiLocalServer.description: Local development server entry for OpenAPI servers[].

openapiWebSocketRoute.description: WebSocket route metadata for OpenAPI generation.

url_env.description: Env var name holding the database URL.

key_env.description: Env var name holding the API key.

todos.description: Defaults for `xbp todos` / `xbp issues` scan|sync (project overrides global). Same shape as top-level `issues:`.
todos.markdownDescription:
TODO → issue automation (`TodosConfig`).

| Field | Purpose |
|-------|--------|
| `default_to` | `linear` \| `github` \| `both` |
| `auto_yes` | Skip multi-select on sync |
| `prompt_sync_after_scan` | Offer sync after scan |
| `watch_paths` | Scan only these prefixes |
| `priority_by_kind` | Linear priority 0–4 per marker |
| `openrouter_enrich` | Opt-in LLM title/body expand |

Commands: `xbp todos scan|sync|status`, `xbp issues …`.

defaultSnippets.label: full todos block
defaultSnippets.body:
annotate_source: true
  auto_yes: true
  default_to: ${1|github,linear,both|}
  github_labels:
  - xbp-todo
  kinds: null
  linear_assignee: null
  linear_labels:
  - xbp-todo
  linear_link_poll_ms: 2000
  linear_link_wait_secs: 20
  linear_project: null
  openrouter_enrich: false
  openrouter_enrich_model: null
  priority_by_kind:
    FIXME: 1
    HACK: 2
    TODO: 3
    XXX: 4
  prompt_sync_after_scan: true
  purge_duplicate_linear: true
  watch_paths:
  - crates
  - apps
  - scripts
  - package_install_scripts
  - sql

default_to.description: Default sync target for created issues: linear, github, or both.
default_to.markdownDescription:
Where `xbp todos sync` / `xbp issues sync` creates issues by default.

- `github` — GitHub issues only
- `linear` — Linear only
- `both` — GitHub first, then Linear (with auto-link wait)

auto_yes.description: When true, sync files all candidates without multi-select prompts.
auto_yes.markdownDescription: When **true**, `xbp issues sync` / `xbp todos sync` creates issues for every candidate without interactive multi-select.

prompt_sync_after_scan.description: After scan, interactively offer to run sync (default true).

linear_labels.description: Linear label names applied to created issues (default: xbp-todo).

github_labels.description: GitHub label names applied to created issues (default: xbp-todo).

linear_assignee.description: Linear assignee for created issues: `me`, display name, email, or user id.

linear_project.description: Linear project for created issues (name, id, or slug).

watch_paths.description: Repo-relative path prefixes to scan for TODO markers. Empty/omit = whole tree.
watch_paths.markdownDescription:
Only scan TODOs under these prefixes (repo-relative).

```yaml
watch_paths:
  - crates
  - apps
  - scripts
  - sql
```

Empty or omit = scan the whole tree.

linear_link_wait_secs.description: Seconds to wait for Linear GitHub auto-link after creating GitHub issues (`--to both`).

linear_link_poll_ms.description: Poll interval (ms) while waiting for Linear↔GitHub integration comments/attachments.

purge_duplicate_linear.description: Archive xbp-created Linear issues that duplicate Linear↔GitHub auto-linked issues.

kinds.description: Only sync these marker kinds. Null/omit = all of TODO, FIXME, XXX, HACK.

priority_by_kind.description: Map marker kind → Linear priority (0–4, lower is higher urgency).
priority_by_kind.markdownDescription:
Linear priority per marker kind (0–4).

Typical defaults:
```yaml
priority_by_kind:
  FIXME: 1
  HACK: 2
  TODO: 3
  XXX: 4
```

annotate_source.description: When true, append created issue ids onto the source TODO line (e.g. `// XLX-99 (#42)`).
annotate_source.markdownDescription: Stamp created issue identifiers onto the source TODO line after create, e.g. `// XLX-99 (#42)`.

openrouter_enrich.description: Opt-in: expand terse TODOs via OpenRouter before create. Default off; must set true or pass `--enrich` on sync.

openrouter_enrich_model.description: OpenRouter model for TODO enrichment (falls back to commit model when null).

discord.description: Discord webhook notifications for release/publish events.

enabled.description: Master switch (defaults true when webhook_url is set).

webhook_url.description: Discord incoming webhook URL or ${DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL}. Aliases: url, webhook.

discordEvents.description: Per-event Discord toggles (omitted keys default enabled).

oci.description: OCI image publish. Aliases: oci_registry, docker.

registries.description: Map of registry host → credentials (e.g. ghcr.io).

default_registry.description: Default registry host when services omit a full image host.

token_source.description: Where to read the token: github, env:VAR, keychain, etc.

image.description: Image repository reference without required tag.

tag.description: Explicit image tag. Prefer tag_from when versioning with XBP.

tag_from.description: Derive tag from project_version, service_version, git_sha, or none.

dockerfile.description: Dockerfile path relative to service root_directory or project root.

context.description: Build context path (defaults to root_directory or .).

kubernetesProject.description: Shared Kubernetes defaults for deploy providers.

default_context.description: kubectl context. Empty string means current context with confirmation policy.

require_context_confirmation_for_apply.description: When true, mutating apply/deploy prompts unless non-interactive --yes.

deployProject.description: Project deploy defaults and groups. Does not replace services[] as the primary deploy unit.

default_env.description: Default environment name for `xbp deploy` when --env is omitted.

history_dir.description: Directory for deploy plan/run history records.

lock_file.description: Optional lock file path to prevent concurrent deploys.

groups.description: Named ordered service sets for `xbp deploy <group>`.

workers.description: Cloudflare Workers apps in this monorepo

order.description: Deploy order. Defaults to services order.

namespace.description: Kubernetes namespace override for this env.

health.description: HTTP(S) health URLs to probe after rollout.

kubernetes.description: Kubernetes deploy settings for this env; omit or null when provider is not kubernetes.

workload.description: kubectl resource for rollout status (e.g. deployment/api).

crds_path.description: Path to CRDs for kubernetes-operator provider.
